page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance from the ecs.u1 family, powered by a KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.5 GHz on Intel Xeon processors. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on external storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks position this instance primarily in the average tier for compute and memory operations. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng score of 1866.99 and a multi-core score of 30903.16. Memory performance is a notable highlight, with the PassMark memory score rated as strong, supported by a read-only small block cached memory bandwidth of 1695.39 GB/sec. Large block uncached memory operations reach 152.43 GB/sec for reads and 69.06 GB/sec for writes.

In application-specific workloads, the instance demonstrates solid capabilities. It achieves 31.0 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks and handles static web serving throughput at 26.9 GB/sec. For language model tasks, it processes small 135M models with a strong text generation speed of 297.4 tokens per second, though performance scales down to 18.36 tokens per second for medium 7B models. This hardware profile is suited for general-purpose enterprise applications, web serving, database operations, and moderate compilation tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, but it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results place its compute capabilities in the average range, with a PassMark CPU score of 34102.79, while its PassMark memory score is strong. It performs efficiently in database operations, static web serving at 26.9 GB/sec, and small-scale language model text generation. This configuration is well-suited for general-purpose enterprise workloads, web hosting, and database management.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering balanced compute and strong memory performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m4.8xlarge features 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 128 GB RAM, offering balanced general-purpose performance.
tagline: A balanced x86_64 compute platform featuring thirty-two dedicated Intel Xeon cores and strong memory performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz.
128.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core.
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization.
Strong memory performance and efficient small-model text generation.
Designed for general-purpose workloads, web serving, and database operations.
